code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import{GetSeasons}from"../services/season-service";import SeasonCard from"../atoms/card/season-card";import{useNavigate}from"react-router-dom";import{GetPlayers}from'../services/player-service';import PlayerCard from'../atoms/card/player-card';import{GetGameStats}from'../services/game-stat-service';import GameStatTable from'../components/game-stats/game-stat-table';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";import{Fragment as _Fragment}from"react/jsx-runtime";import{jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Home=()=>{const navigate=useNavigate();const[seasons,setData]=useState(null);const[players,setPlayerData]=useState(null);const[gameStats,setGameStats]=useState(null);useEffect(()=>{GetSeasons().then(seasons=>setData(seasons));},[]);useEffect(()=>{GetPlayers().then(players=>setPlayerData(players));},[]);useEffect(()=>{GetGameStats().then(gameStats=>setGameStats(gameStats));},[]);const handleClick=seasonId=>navigate('/Fixtures/'+seasonId);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(_Fragment,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"row",children:seasons?seasons.map(item=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(SeasonCard,{season:item,handleClick:handleClick,children:" "},item.id)):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Loading Seasons..."})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"row",children:players?players.map(item=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(PlayerCard,{player:item})):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Loading Players..."})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"row",children:gameStats?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(GameStatTable,{gameStats:gameStats}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Loading Stats..."})})]});};export default Home;
